title: User SPARQL cannot delete triple with a string as object (SR186 DB.DBA.L_O_LOOK_NE)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS application_graph (subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, object TEXT);
INSERT INTO application_graph (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('http://mu.semte.ch/application/name-as-string', 'http://schema.org/name', 'My name');
INSERT INTO application_graph (subject, predicate, object) VALUES ('http://mu.semte.ch/application/name-as-uri', 'http://schema.org/name', 'http://mu.semte.ch/application/myname');
DELETE FROM application_graph WHERE subject = 'http://mu.semte.ch/application/name-as-string' AND predicate = 'http://schema.org/name' AND object = 'My name';
SELECT subject, object FROM application_graph WHERE predicate = 'http://schema.org/name';
key_bug_features: Deleting triples with string objects fails due to permission error
